wine_schools.name: DOQ Priorat Tasting Workshops
courses_offered: Introduction to DOQ Priorat soils and terroir (half-day)
Garnacha and Carinena varietal tasting (2 hours)
Old-vine Priorat producer masterclass
Priorat vs Montsant comparative tasting
wine_schools.price_range: From EUR 30 per workshop; bundled programmes on request
wine_schools.description: Official denomination workshops at the DOQ Priorat visitor centre in Falset; soil-to-glass tastings covering llicorella terroir, Garnacha and Carinena varietals.

wine_schools.name: Clos Mogador Producer Tasting Masterclass
wine_schools.address: Camino Manyetes s/n, 43737 Gratallops, Tarragona, Spain
courses_offered: Manyetes terroir and single-parcel tasting
Garnacha through three vintages vertical
Llicorella soil education session
wine_schools.price_range: Premium fee for private masterclass; contact winery
wine_schools.description: Producer-led tasting masterclass at Clos Mogador; the cellar team guide guests through Manyetes single-parcel Garnacha and llicorella soil education.

wine_schools.name: Alvaro Palacios Educational Estate Visit
wine_schools.address: Carretera de Gratallops a la Vilella Baixa km 1, 43737 Gratallops, Tarragona, Spain
courses_offered: L'Ermita and Finca Dofi terroir seminar
Old-vine Garnacha and Carinena guided tasting
Priorat revival history lecture with vertical
wine_schools.price_range: Very limited availability; contact winery for rates
wine_schools.description: Appointment-only educational visit at Alvaro Palacios covering the post-1989 Priorat revival through a Finca Dofi and L'Ermita soil and tasting seminar.

verified.address_quoted: Carretera de Gratallops a la Vilella Baixa km 1, Gratallops

wine_schools.name: DO Montsant Educational Workshop
wine_schools.address: Avinguda de la Catalunya 2, 43730 Falset, Tarragona, Spain
courses_offered: Introduction to DO Montsant terroir and varietals
Montsant vs Priorat comparative tasting
Cooperative wines education session
Garnacha and Syrah in Montsant workshop
wine_schools.price_range: From EUR 25 per session; group rates available
wine_schools.description: DO Montsant runs education workshops from the Falset cooperative building; the Montsant-vs-Priorat comparative tasting is the standout session for serious students.

wine_schools.name: Scala Dei Winery Education Programme
wine_schools.address: Rambla de la Cartoixa s/n, 43379 Escaladei, Tarragona, Spain
courses_offered: Cartoixa d'Escaladei history and wine lecture
Priorat viticulture from 1163 to present
Guided cellar and vineyard education session
Garnacha Blanca and old-vine Garnacha comparative tasting
wine_schools.price_range: From EUR 20-35 per person depending on programme
wine_schools.description: Education programme at Bodega Scala Dei at the Cartoixa d'Escaladei ruins; covers 12th-century Carthusian origins through modern DOQ Priorat viticulture.

verified.address_quoted: Rambla de la Cartoixa s/n, 43379 Escaladei

wine_schools.name: Cooperativa Falset Marca Wine Education
wine_schools.address: Avinguda de la Catalunya 2, 43730 Falset, Tarragona, Spain
courses_offered: Cooperative winemaking from vine to bottle
Garnacha and Carinena varietal education
Montsant terroir class with Etim range tasting
Architecture and wine: the Martinell building story
wine_schools.price_range: From EUR 15-30 per person per session
wine_schools.description: Education sessions at the Cooperativa Falset Marca covering cooperative winemaking, Montsant varietals and the 1919 Martinell building history; accessible entry-level wine education.
